TypeStructureChinese ExampleEnglish Translation
1. This这 + MW + N这个朋友This friend
2. That那 + MW + N那本书That book
3. Which哪 + MW + N哪只杯子Which cup
4. Several / How many几 + MW + N几本菜单Several/How many menus
5. Every / Each每 + MW + N每个朋友Every friend
6. NumberNum + MW + N三个朋友Three friends
7. Ordinal (1st, 2nd...)第 + Num + MW + N第一个月The first month
8. Last / Previous上 + MW + N上个月Last month
9. Next / Following下 + MW + N下个月Next month

Structure TypePatternExample
Option 1Subject + Time Point + Verb + Duration + Object我昨天看三个小时书。
Option 2Subject + Time Point + Verb + Object + Verb + Duration我昨天看书看了三个小时。
Option 3Subject + Time Point + Verb + Object + 要 + Duration我每天学中文要两个小时。

1. Months & Weeks

  • Month Name: 二月 (February) vs. Duration: 二个月 (2 months).
  • Weeks: Use 个 for duration (e.g., 三个星期 = 3 weeks).
  • Sunday: Use 星期天 (Spoken) or 星期日 (Written).

2. Years & Dates

  • Dates: 12.18 $\rightarrow$ 十二月十八号.
  • Global Numbers (Duration): 二十五年 (25 years).
  • Specific Years (Point): 二〇二五年 (The year 2025).
ReferenceDays (天)Years (年)Weeks/Months

fields.Comment:
1)Verb + 了 + ...
Start in past, don't know if he still eating.
我吃了中国菜

2) Verb ... + 了
Start in past, don't know if he still eating.
我吃中国菜 了

4) Ver b+ 了 + ... +（了）
Start in past, don't know if he still eating.
我吃了中国菜 了

5) Verb +（了）+ Quantity + ... + 了
Start in past, don't know if he still eating.
我吃了一小时饭中国菜了
=> To have a finished action with le 了
=> Need to add time point :我今天中午吃了一小时饭中国菜了

6) Verb+过
Past action, action will not happen again
我吃过中国菜

fields.Comment:
Subject + verb + object + verb + 得 + adjective

Verb 3 possibilities：打，跳，唱，说，写，画，做
1. 她跳得很好。
2. 她跳舞跳得很好
3. 她舞跳得很好。

The Rule: Don't Break the "Verb" Part：
跑步，游泳， 睡觉，走路
1.我跑得很慢
2.我跑步跑得很慢
3.我步跑得很慢 《= Cannot say

Verb Obvious meaning （no need 2nd part）：
穿，吃，喝，玩，聊
1. 我穿得很多

HSK Common Non-Separable List:
Char PinyinMeaningExample Sentence (Verb + 得 + Adverb/Result)
喜欢xǐhuānTo like他喜欢得不得了。 (He likes it extremely much.)
学习xuéxíTo study你学习得很努力。 (You study very hard.)
打算dǎsuànTo plan他打算得很周到。 (He planned very thoughtfully.)
准备zhǔnbèiTo prepare我们准备得很充分。 (We prepared very fully.)

帮助bāngzhùTo help他帮助得非常及时。 (His help was very timely.)

fields.Comment:
ResultMeaningNuanceExample
完 (wán)FinishThe action is simply over.做完饭了 (Finished cooking).
好 (hǎo)Ready/SatisfiedDone to a good standard or ready to use.做好饭了 (Dinner is ready/set).
到 (dào)AchievedYou hit a goal, found something, or reached a time/place.做到了 (Achieved a goal).

Understanding Results (懂 vs. 见)

These describe your senses and comprehension.
  • 懂 (dǒng) - Understanding:
    • 听懂: To understand what you hear (e.g., I understand what you said).
    • 看懂: To understand what you see/read (e.g., I understand the data/this character).
  • 见 (jiàn) - Perception:
    • 看见: To see (the result of looking).
    • 听见: To hear (the result of listening).

Special Result Focus: 到 (dào)

到 is very versatile. Use it for reaching a time, a place, or receiving something.
  • Time: 我等到了10点。 (I waited until 10 o'clock.)
  • Place: 我走到了学校。 (I walked to [reached] the school.)
  • Receiving: 我收到了邮件。 (I received the email.)
  • Finding: 我找到了我的猫。 (I found [successfully looked for] my cat.)

VerbResultMeaning
说 / 做对 / 错Say/Do it correctly or wrongly.
洗 / 打扫干净Wash/Sweep clean.
听 / 看 / 讲清楚Hear/See/Explain clearly.
摔 / 弄坏Drop/Handle and break it.
记住Remember it firmly (memorize).
睡 / 找着 (zháo)Fall asleep / Succeed in finding.
